item.title: Orange cat problems: 1 brain cell, unlimited chaos, zero survival instincts 😭🐾 Woke up → knocked something over → forgot why → screamed anyway Real talk… behind the chaos, their health still matters. Even the most unhinged little gremlin deserves a routin
